seo.title: Free 2-minute AI adoption score · know exactly where you stand
seo.description: 10 weighted questions across strategy, tools, adoption and impact. You get an instant maturity score, the weakest area named, and a ranked next-step roadmap. Free.
seo.keywords: AI maturity assessment, AI adoption score, free AI readiness test, AI maturity model, AI audit, EU AI Act Article 4 readiness, Copilot adoption score, Romania, EU
seo.docTitle: AI Adoption Score, The Unlearning School

results.shareBody:
I just took the AI Adoption Score from The Unlearning School and got {{score}}/100 ({{rank}}).

Take yours here (2 minutes): https://tuslast.lovable.app/ai-adoption-score

method.subtitle: Not all aspects of AI readiness are equal. Adoption and strategy weigh more because they have the biggest impact on real outcomes.

cta.title: Score in hand. Now what?
cta.subtitle: A 30-minute call to walk through your gaps and decide the first move that actually moves the number.

questions.text: Does your organization have a documented AI strategy?
Are senior leaders actively using AI in their daily work?
options: No, leadership is not using AI
Leadership champions AI and models usage for the team

questions.text: Is there a dedicated budget for AI training and tools?
options: Budget exists but not formally tracked
Dedicated annual budget with clear allocation

questions.text: Do employees have access to approved AI tools?
options: No approved tools - people use whatever they find
Some tools available but no clear guidance
Approved toolset exists, most people know about it
Clear approved toolkit with onboarding for each tool

questions.text: Are AI tools integrated into daily workflows?
options: No - AI sits alongside regular tools, unused
Several teams have AI in their workflows
AI is embedded in core processes across the organization

questions.text: Are there clear guidelines on which AI tool to use for which task?
options: Clear decision framework documented and shared

questions.text: What percentage of your team regularly uses AI in their work?
Does your organization provide formal AI training?
Are there identified AI champions who mentor others?
options: Champions recognized but not formally supported
Formal champion program with time/resources allocated

questions.text: Can you measure time saved or productivity gained from AI usage?
options: We have no measurement at all
We have metrics for specific use cases

strategy: Identify and approve 3 initial use cases
tools: Define default AI tools for the org
Document where AI is permitted vs forbidden
adoption: Run a cohort workshop with 10 people
impact: Track hours saved per week per use case
Measure frequency + quality of AI outputs

leader.name: AI Leader
leader.desc: Strong maturity. Next step: scale and govern.

advanced.name: AI Advanced
advanced.desc: Good momentum. Opportunity: standardize and align leadership.

builder.name: AI Builder
builder.desc: Activity without structure. Need: standards, champions, training.

starter.name: AI Starter
starter.desc: Early stage. Fastest win: enablement sprint.
